test_cases.title: Validate Agentic AI processes standard news content input correctly
steps: Input a standard news article text into the AI analysis system
Trigger the analysis process
Collect the AI-generated insights and summary
test_cases.expected_result: AI processes the news content accurately, generating relevant insights and a coherent summary without errors

test_cases.title: Handle empty news content input gracefully
steps: Submit an empty news content input to the AI analysis system
Trigger the analysis process
test_cases.expected_result: System returns a meaningful error or warning indicating input cannot be empty without crashing

test_cases.title: Verify AI system rejects malformed news content input
steps: Input malformed or corrupted news content data (e.g., binary data instead of text)
Trigger the analysis process
test_cases.expected_result: System handles the malformed input by rejecting with an appropriate error message without crashing or producing invalid output

test_cases.title: Ensure AI output reliability under medium complexity news inputs
steps: Input news articles with complex language and mixed sentiments
Trigger the analysis process
Review the AI-generated insights for accuracy, bias, and consistency
test_cases.expected_result: AI outputs unbiased, reliable, and consistent analysis aligned with expected business rules

test_cases.title: Data privacy compliance verification during AI news analysis
steps: Input news content containing sensitive or personal data
Trigger the analysis
Verify data handling and output comply with privacy regulations and masking policies
test_cases.expected_result: Sensitive data is processed according to compliance standards, with no leakage or improper exposure

test_cases.title: Performance testing: AI analysis response time under typical load
steps: Simulate multiple concurrent submissions of standard news articles (e.g., 50 simultaneous users)
Measure AI analysis response and processing time
test_cases.expected_result: Response time remains within acceptable SLA thresholds (e.g., under 3 seconds per analysis)

test_cases.title: Scalability testing: AI system behavior under peak load
steps: Simulate a high volume of news content input requests (e.g., 500+ simultaneous users)
Monitor system stability, throughput, and error rate
test_cases.expected_result: System remains stable with acceptable throughput and error rates below 1%

test_cases.title: Reliability testing: AI system recovers cleanly from unexpected failure
steps: Force AI system failure during ongoing news analysis
Observe system recovery and resumption of service
test_cases.expected_result: System recovers automatically or with minimal manual intervention, with no data loss or corruption

test_cases.title: Negative test: Validate system logs and error messages for invalid user authentication
steps: Attempt to access AI analysis functionalities with invalid user credentials
Attempt to trigger analysis process
test_cases.expected_result: Access denied with clear error message; all attempts logged for audit

test_cases.title: Verify AI analysis accuracy on boundary text length inputs
steps: Test AI with news content inputs at minimum allowed length (e.g., one sentence)
Test AI with news content inputs at maximum allowed length (e.g., large article limit)
Trigger analysis process each time
test_cases.expected_result: System handles boundary inputs properly without errors and produces valid analysis

results.failure_analysis: AI output exhibited occasional bias in sentiment analysis of mixed language inputs, causing inconsistencies with expected business rules.
Under peak load, system showed increased error rate (~2%) and degraded throughput beyond acceptable thresholds.

triaged_defects.cluster: Agentic AI - News Analysis Core Logic
triaged_defects.root_cause_hint: Potential issues in AI model integration affecting news content parsing accuracy.

triaged_defects.cluster: Agentic AI - News Analysis Core Logic
triaged_defects.root_cause_hint: Likely related to data preprocessing or AI module misconfiguration causing output inconsistencies.

defect_triage.release_risk_summary: Current defects indicate medium severity issues in core AI analysis logic impacting output reliability. Given the medium risk profile of the project and critical timeline, these defects should be fixed before release to ensure AI output reliability and data compliance.
